overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a cowboy hat and red top walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character descends stairs into a covered street, interacts with a purple vending machine, ascends to an upper plaza, and sits overlooking the sprawling cyberpunk metropolis with vibrant holographic billboards and wet reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath neon overpass

events.description: character begins descending concrete stairs into the lower street level
reaches bottom of stairs and continues walking along the wet neon-lit sidewalk

agents.ego_description: descending stairs into the covered street and walking forward along the wet pavement with neon reflections

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the same direction ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large curved overpass structure with pink and blue neon lighting spanning across the street
wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading down to street level
reflective wet concrete surface mirroring the neon lights above
tall cyberpunk skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage
small red automated vending booth with glowing display

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide concrete staircase into a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive neon-lit overpass. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant pink and blue neon lights from the bridge above and surrounding futuristic buildings. Sparse pedestrians walk along the sidewalk as the character approaches a red vending machine.

scene_state.functional_zone: vending machine plaza with purple neon machines

events.description: character stops walking and approaches the purple vending machines
character squats down to interact with the vending machine interface

agents.ego_description: stopping at the purple vending machines, standing briefly, then squatting down to interact with the interface

notable_agents.action: NPC with blue hair standing at adjacent vending machine browsing items

entered.detail: tall purple automated vending machine with 'THE LOVE' text in pink neon and multiple product displays
large vertical digital screen displaying pink and purple advertisements on building facade
futuristic bench with cyan blue neon underlighting along the base

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a pair of purple vending machines labeled 'THE LOVE' with bright pink neon text. While the character squats to interact with the machine, an NPC with blue hair browses the adjacent machine. The area features a glowing blue neon bench and is surrounded by tall buildings with large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase ascending to upper city level

events.description: character stands up and walks away from the vending machines toward the stairs
character begins ascending the concrete stairs to the upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking away from the vending area and ascending the wide concrete stairs with green railings to the upper level

notable_agents.action: large male NPC in yellow pants descending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with green metal railings leading upward to the plaza
green painted metal handrails along the staircase sides
tall buildings with illuminated facades visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the vending machines behind and walks toward a wide concrete staircase with green railings. As she ascends, she passes a large NPC descending in the opposite direction. The stairs lead upward toward an upper plaza with tall buildings visible at the top, transitioning from the covered street to a more open elevated area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza overlooking the neon cityscape

events.description: character emerges onto the open upper plaza with panoramic city views
character sits down on a bench at the overlook to view the city

agents.ego_description: walking across the upper plaza and sitting down on a bench to overlook the sprawling neon cityscape

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on adjacent bench facing the city view

entered.detail: open concrete plaza area at the top of the stairs with panoramic views of the city
concrete bench seating along the plaza edge overlooking the city
expansive view of the cyberpunk city with countless neon signs and holographic billboards
large floating holographic advertisements and building-sized digital displays

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the open upper plaza, the character is greeted by a breathtaking panoramic view of the sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. The area features bench seating along the edge where other pedestrians sit enjoying the view. The character walks to a bench and sits down, overlooking the dense cluster of skyscrapers covered in vibrant neon signs and massive holographic billboards that illuminate the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a neon-lit underpass into a covered street before ascending to a panoramic overlook of a futuristic metropolis. It begins as the character walks down a wide concrete staircase into a pedestrian walkway, where wet pavement reflects the vibrant pink and blue lights of a massive overpass. As the character stops to interact with purple vending machines labeled THE LOVE, the scene remains enclosed by towering buildings and glowing digital billboards. The camera then follows the character as she leaves the machines and climbs a set of green-railed stairs, transitioning from the sheltered street toward a more open elevated space. Finally, the view expands upon reaching the upper plaza, where the character sits on a bench to overlook a dense cluster of skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards illuminating the night sky.
